stories.headline: FOMC week pins crypto: BTC stuck below $80K as traders price zero rate cuts
stories.tldr: Bitcoin trades near $78K and Ether near $2,330 as the FOMC meeting becomes the week's defining macro catalyst with markets pricing no cut.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: A hawkish hold or surprise dovish tilt sets the tape for the next leg of the 2026 cycle, with Strategy and ETFs already absorbing supply at this range.
the_details: BTC +0.56% to roughly $78,112; ETH +0.61% to $2,328 ahead of the FOMC decision later this week.
Strategy now holds 818,334 BTC bought for ~$62B at a $75,537 average — the float is increasingly trapped above cost basis.
Short-term holder profit-taking is offsetting fresh ETF and Strategy demand, capping price below the $80K resistance band.

stories.headline: April becomes worst month for crypto theft since Bybit: $606M lost in 18 days
stories.tldr: Two Lazarus-linked exploits — Drift and KelpDAO — drove April losses past $606M, the worst stretch since the $1.4B Bybit hit in February 2025.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: Concentrated DPRK targeting of admin keys and bridges is hardening institutional risk policy and pushing TVL out of long-tail DeFi.
the_details: Drift Protocol lost $285M on April 1 after a social-engineered admin key whitelisted bogus collateral.
KelpDAO's LayerZero rsETH bridge bled $292M on April 18, ~95% of the month's total combined with Drift.
Aave, Lido and EtherFi are coordinating an ETH-funded bailout to plug the KelpDAO shortfall.

stories.headline: SEC carves DeFi front-ends out of broker-dealer rules in April 13 staff statement
stories.tldr: SEC Trading and Markets staff said it won't object to 'Covered User Interface Providers' helping users submit crypto-asset-security trades without registering as brokers.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: The carve-out unblocks US-domiciled DeFi UI development that had been frozen since 2022 and pressures the Senate to mark up the CLARITY Act.
the_details: Statement issued April 13, 2026 by the SEC Division of Trading and Markets, building on the March 17 SEC-CFTC joint taxonomy.
Over 100 firms including Coinbase and Ripple are pushing the Senate Banking Committee to mark up the CLARITY Act this quarter.
Combined with the GENIUS Act stablecoin rulemaking, US crypto policy now has its clearest perimeter in nearly a decade.

stories.headline: Spot ETH ETFs notch 10-day green streak, pulling in $633M as institutional bid holds
stories.tldr: All ten US-listed Ethereum spot ETFs logged simultaneous net inflows for ten straight sessions, totaling $633M and outpacing every altcoin product.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: Sustained ETH demand at sub-$2,400 prices sets a structural floor and resets the ETH/BTC ratio narrative going into the Prague upgrade.
the_details: All 10 spot ETH ETFs printed net positive flows for 10 consecutive trading days, summing to $633M.
ETH is trading near $2,328 — the streak occurred while price moved sideways, signaling accumulation rather than chase.
Institutional desks cite the Prague upgrade and SEC-CFTC taxonomy as catalysts for the renewed bid.

stories.headline: XRP institutional rails snap together: Goldman tops holders, Coinbase TAS futures launch May 1
stories.tldr: US spot XRP ETFs hold $1.53B AUM with Goldman as the largest institutional holder; Coinbase launches Trade-at-Settlement XRP futures on May 1.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: TAS plus a commodity classification turns XRP into one of the few altcoins with a proper institutional execution stack — a template peers will chase.
the_details: Spot XRP ETFs custody 773M XRP worth $1.53B; weekly inflows of $119.6M trail only ETH.
Coinbase Derivatives launches Trade at Settlement for XRP futures on May 1, 2026, easing block execution.
March 17 SEC-CFTC joint release classified XRP as a digital commodity, removing the long-standing securities overhang.
